mapper.select:
SELECT blog_article.*,blog_topic.topic_name FROM blog_article left join blog_topic on blog_article.topic_id = blog_topic.id
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{title},'%')
AND topic_id = #{topicId}
order by update_time desc

SELECT blog_article.id, blog_article.title, blog_article.summary, blog_article.content_html, blog_topic.topic_name, blog_article.create_time, blog_article.update_time FROM blog_article LEFT JOIN blog_topic ON blog_article.topic_id = blog_topic.id WHERE blog_article.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article (title, summary, content_md, content_html, topic_id, sort, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{contentMd}, #{contentHtml}, #{topicId}, #{sort}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT blog_article.id, blog_article.title, blog_article.summary, blog_article.content_md, blog_article.content_html, blog_article.topic_id, blog_topic.topic_name, blog_article.sort, blog_article.create_time, blog_article.update_time FROM blog_article LEFT JOIN blog_topic ON blog_article.topic_id = blog_topic.id WHERE blog_article.id = #{id}
